channel.title: GitHub Lua Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Lua in GitHub

item.title: gaboolic/rime-frost
item.description: 白霜拼音：蒹葭苍苍，白露为霜。白霜拼音使用使用745396750字的高质量语料，进行分词，重新统计字频、词频，归一化，打造纯净、词频准确、智能的词库。白霜词库是目前rime方案下最好的开源词库，立志于打造不输于商业输入法的输入体验。

item.title: koreader/koreader
item.description: An ebook reader application supporting PDF, DjVu, EPUB, FB2 and many more formats, running on Cervantes, Kindle, Kobo, PocketBook and Android devices

item.title: echasnovski/mini.nvim
item.description: Library of 40+ independent Lua modules improving overall Neovim (version 0.8 and higher) experience with minimal effort

item.title: NeogitOrg/neogit
item.description: An interactive and powerful Git interface for Neovim, inspired by Magit

item.title: xmake-io/xmake
item.description: 🔥 A cross-platform build utility based on Lua

item.title: Kong/kong
item.description: 🦍 The Cloud-Native API Gateway and AI Gateway.

item.title: karb94/neoscroll.nvim
item.description: Smooth scrolling neovim plugin written in lua

item.title: linkease/istore
item.description: 一个 Openwrt 标准的软件中心，纯脚本实现，只依赖Openwrt标准组件。支持其它固件开发者集成到自己的固件里面。更方便入门用户搜索安装插件。The iStore is a app store for OpenWRT

item.title: esx-framework/esx_core
item.description: Official Repo For core resources for esx-legacy

item.title: ThePrimeagen/refactoring.nvim
item.description: The Refactoring library based off the Refactoring book by Martin Fowler

item.title: folke/lazy.nvim
item.description: 💤 A modern plugin manager for Neovim

item.title: Mintimate/oh-my-rime
item.description: The Simple Config Template Of Rime By Mintimate. QQ Chat-Group: 703260572

item.title: AstroNvim/astrocommunity
item.description: A community repository of common plugin specifications
